issue.title: Windows packaging should preserve CLI config directory
issue.body: HTTPie on Windows loses the CLI config directory during packaged install. Steps to reproduce: install package, run http --debug, and inspect config path. Expected behavior: config directory is preserved. Suggested fix: update packaging path logic and add Windows packaging test.

reasons: Overlay trusted CLI issue should rank strongly.

issue.title: Transpile bindings for u32 map to number in d.ts
issue.body: Generated TypeScript bindings map WIT u32 to number, allowing invalid negative values. Steps to reproduce: run jco transpile on the sample WIT and call with negative values. Expected behavior: generated bindings prevent or trap invalid values. Suggested fix: adjust generated type/runtime validation and add tests.

repository.description: JavaScript tooling for WebAssembly components and TypeScript bindings

reasons: Overlay trusted profile match should survive lower repo influence.

issue.title: Controlling Context in Client for Sampling Requests
issue.body: The Python SDK client does not expose enough control over sampling request context. Steps to reproduce: send a sampling request with custom context and inspect the generated request. Expected behavior: caller can control context fields. Suggested fix: add client option and tests.

repository.description: Python SDK for model context protocol developer tools

reasons: Global candidate may be visible when profile and execution are strong.

issue.title: Add bounty issue template for new contributors
issue.body: Add a new issue template and bounty label for contributors. No code changes are required.

reasons: Global marketplace/bounty noise should be blocked.

issue.title: Providing glob pattern to input flag does not produce TS d.ts files
issue.body: How to reproduce: run json2ts -i src/**/*.schema.json. Expected output: generated d.ts files in corresponding directories. Actual behavior: output prints to stdout. Suggested fix: clarify glob output behavior or implement directory output and add CLI tests.

repository.description: CLI that compiles JSON Schema to TypeScript definitions

reasons: Trusted CLI/devtools candidate with strong profile fit despite age.

issue.title: Add dark mode toggle to recipe explorer
issue.body: Add a dark mode toggle button to the recipe explorer lite app.

reasons: Global toy app should not compete with trusted devtools issues.
